name: Pasta W/Roasted Vegetables and Balsamic Vineg
recipeIngredient: 1 bulb of scallions, cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped scallions, bell pepper, zucchini, tomatoes, garlic, balsamic vinegar, and olive oil in a shallow baking dish.
2. Bake at 400 degrees for about 30 minutes, stirring once, or until vegetables are soft.
3. Meanwhile, cook the pasta in boiling water according to package directions.
4. Drain the hot cooked pasta and toss with the vegetables.
5. Serve in a warmed bowl or dish.
